description: x402 passthrough for DefiLlama key-free token prices: current, historical, charts and % change across chains by contract address. Manipulation-resistant cross-check price source for agents. Data by DefiLlama.

endpoints.description: Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated)

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/prices/current/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /prices/current/{coins}
zh-CN.title: Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /prices/current/{coins}
endpoints.title: Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated) through the defillama-coins-price-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}
zh-CN.title: Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}
endpoints.title: Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins through the defillama-coins-price-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Price chart (time series) for one or many coins

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/chart/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /chart/{coins}
zh-CN.title: Price chart (time series) for one or many coins
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /chart/{coins}
endpoints.title: Price chart (time series) for one or many coins
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs price chart (time series) for one or many coins through the defillama-coins-price-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/percentage/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /percentage/{coins}
zh-CN.title: Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /percentage/{coins}
endpoints.title: Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs percentage price change over a period for one or many coins through the defillama-coins-price-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: DefiLlama 数据 API（TRON） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.subtitle: Use to get current or historical USD price for one or many tokens by {chain}:{address} (or coingecko:{id}), plus price charts and percent change.
zh-CN.title: DefiLlama 数据 API（TRON）
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

main_title: DefiLlama Token Price API (current / historical / chart) (TRON x402)
sub_title: Use to get current or historical USD price for one or many tokens by {chain}:{address} (or coingecko:{id}), plus price charts and percent change.
